name: site-modernize
description: Modernize an existing public website into a static Next.js site from a user-provided template.

interface.shortDescription: Rebuild an existing website as a modern static Next.js site
interface.longDescription: Site Modernize guides Codex through crawling an existing public website, extracting real content and assets, applying a user-provided template, composing a data-driven static Next.js site, and validating SEO, metadata, and build output.
defaultPrompt: Modernize this website into a static Next.js site
Refresh this site using my template
Rebuild this URL as a data-driven marketing site
